meta_title: For Founders: testing automation to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to testing automation and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Test Automation to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use test automation to overcome the 'no portfolio' trap. A beginner-level guide for founders using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' barrier is a ghost that haunts your conversion rates. Solve it by automating your test suite. By demonstrating rigorous testing, you prove technical maturity to skeptical clients. Use Antigravity to generate high-coverage test suites and Claude Code to execute them, transforming empty repos into enterprise-grade assets.
content.intro:
The cold reality of the SaaS market is that no one buys a 'promising' idea from a ghost. Clients and investors don't care about your roadmap; they care about your reliability. When you lack a portfolio, your code must speak with the authority of a veteran team, and nothing screams 'professional' louder than a robust, automated testing suite.

Stop waiting for the perfect client to build your portfolio. By architecting a rigorous testing framework today, you aren't just writing tests—you are building a narrative of stability and technical excellence. Let’s turn your 'no portfolio' disadvantage into your biggest sales asset using the combined power of Antigravity and Claude Code.

steps.title: Define the Testing Architecture
steps.description: Establish a clear testing strategy that covers critical user flows to demonstrate product reliability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current codebase structure and generate a comprehensive testing plan using Pytest and Playwright. Focus on critical path validation to showcase enterprise-level reliability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'init testing suite for core business logic'

steps.title: Automate Unit Test Generation
steps.description: Generate granular tests for your core business logic to prove you write maintainable code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create unit tests for all service-layer functions. Ensure 90% code coverage and include edge case handling for input validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'generate unit tests for /services directory'

steps.title: Implement Integration Testing
steps.description: Showcase your ability to handle complex system interactions between APIs and databases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft integration tests for the authentication and payment gateway modules. Mock dependencies where necessary and ensure database state resets after each run.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'execute integration suite against staging'

steps.title: Establish CI/CD Feedback Loops
steps.description: Automate the execution of your tests every time you push code, proving you value continuous integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow file that triggers the test suite on every pull request and generates a coverage report.

steps.title: Document Test Coverage for Clients
steps.description: Create a summary report that explains your testing philosophy to potential stakeholders.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the current testing architecture and coverage metrics into a professional README.md section titled 'Quality Assurance Standards'.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'update README with testing documentation'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Test Coverage' badge in your README; it is the single most effective visual signal of technical maturity.
Focus your testing efforts on 'happy path' revenue flows first; clients care more about checkout success than edge-case UI bugs.
Use Claude Code to refactor your tests into descriptive, human-readable specs that double as product documentation.
Treat your test code with the same architectural rigor as your production code; messy tests signal a messy developer.
Automate your feedback loop so that every successful test suite generates a 'Quality Verified' report you can send to prospects.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to a staging environment and link your new automated testing dashboard directly in your sales pitch deck to prove your reliability.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the 'no portfolio' label keep you from your first sale. By mastering test automation, you position yourself as a high-value partner who builds for the long term. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
